full_description: BookBuddy is a book tracking app that helps users discover, track, and review books. It provides personalized book recommendations based on your reading history and preferences. With BookBuddy, you can create a virtual bookshelf, add books to your wishlist, and set reminders for upcoming releases. The app also allows you to write and share reviews, join discussions, and connect with fellow book lovers. Whether you're a casual reader or a bookworm, BookBuddy is the perfect companion for anyone who loves books.
